user.title: Connect to Alectra Utilities
user.description: Enter the credentials from your Alectra utility bill. If using the Alectra Scraper add-on, find the sidecar URL in the add-on info page.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the scraper service. Verify the sidecar URL and that the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Verify your account name, number, and phone number.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
